title: SEO & Content Marketing
description: Rank on Page 1 for high-intent keywords. I build topic clusters, optimize technical SEO, and create content strategies that drive organic traffic and convert visitors into leads.

title: Paid Advertising
description: Google, Meta, TikTok & LinkedIn ads that actually convert. I handle full-funnel campaign strategy, creative testing, audience targeting, and budget optimization.

title: Social Media Marketing
description: Build a brand presence that attracts and retains followers. Content strategy, community management, and platform-specific campaigns that grow your audience and drive engagement.

title: Email Marketing
description: Automated email sequences that nurture leads and retain customers. From welcome flows to win-back campaigns — I build systems that run while you sleep.

title: Analytics & Reporting
description: Turn data into decisions. I set up GA4, build Looker Studio dashboards, and give you clear weekly reports that show exactly what's working and where to invest next.

title: Growth Strategy
description: Full-funnel marketing strategy tailored to your business goals. I audit your current setup, identify the highest-leverage opportunities, and build a 90-day growth roadmap.
